effect: Selena summons an Abyssal Devil to bite the target, dealing (+800%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG.

Leomord charges briefly to deal (+480%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies in front. He gains Control Immunity and 40% DMG Reduction while charging.
